_publications._publicationTitle: Multidimensional Immunotyping of Human NF1-Associated Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors Uncovers Tumor-Associated Macrophages as Key Drivers of Immune Evasion in the Tumor Microenvironment.

_contextSnippet: among the 29 MPNST samples, 14 (48.3%) MPNST had PD-L1 expression in greater than 10% of all cells. This is in contrast to only 25% (4/16) PN samples with PD-L1 expression exceeding 10%
details: Successfully detected PD-L1 expression with 48.3% of MPNST samples showing >10% expression vs 25% of PN samples; 50.3% of CD163+ TAM expressed PD-L1 vs 15.6% of non-immune cells
